name: CARPENTER TECHNOLOGY CORP
summary: PARTI (a) General Development of Business: Carpenter Technology Corporation, founded in 1889, is engaged in the manufacturing, fabrication and distribution of specialty metals. As used throughout this report, unless the context requires otherwise, the terms "Carpenter," "Carpenter Technology," "Company," "Registrant," "Issuer," "we" and "our" refer to Carpenter Technology Corporation. (b) Financial Information About Segments: We are organized in two reportable business segments: Specialty Alloys...
